title: claytonia diffusa
intro: Claytonia diffusa, also known as Miner's lettuce, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like iron and calcium, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Claytonia diffusa include teas, infusions, and dried leaves, which can be consumed fresh or cooked to harness its medicinal properties.
